segments.text: He's taken control through poking, but Trolley is still holding neutral against that forward tilt
segments.original_text: ここ突き取ってきたが横強に対してトロッコ側はまだ静観

segments.text: Caught by the nair on the descent! Beautiful mixup!
segments.original_text: 降り空Nに打たれる 変化

full_text: He's taken control through poking, but Trolley is still holding neutral against that forward tilt Trolley's coming in! Caught by the nair on the descent! Beautiful mixup!

corrections.original: 横橋に対してトロッコ側はまだ正観
corrections.corrected: 横強に対してトロッコ側はまだ静観
corrections.rule: kanji: 横橋→横強, 正観→静観

corrections.original: 折り口に打たれる変化
corrections.corrected: 降り空Nに打たれる 変化
